title: Staub Cast Iron Tealight Food Warmer – Vintage (1970–1980) – Made in France
description:
Elegant vintage tealight food warmer by Staub, made from enameled cast iron. This stylish table warmer is designed to hold tealight candles underneath to keep dishes warm during meals, making it both practical and decorative.
A beautiful addition to any table setting, perfect for serving hot dishes while maintaining an elegant presentation. The solid cast iron construction ensures durability and excellent heat retention.
Brand: Staub
Material: Enameled cast iron
Origin: Made in France
Period: Vintage, 1970–1980
Condition: Good vintage condition (please see photos as part of the description)
Use: Ideal for keeping plates or serving dishes warm with tealight candles
A rare and collectible piece from the iconic French cookware brand, perfect for collectors or for adding a touch of vintage charm to your dining table.
